settings.heading: ONE CHARGE. DAYS OF PLAY.
settings.text: Dynasty Headphone always gives you the best sound while using active noise cancellation, for up to 38 hours of non-stop listening. That's a trip from Paris to Perth and back again.

settings.heading: PUT THE WORLD ON PAUSE
settings.text: Five levels of noise cancellation make Dynasty Headphone our most advanced ANC headphones yet, handling everything from the hum of home life to the commotion of a commute.

settings.heading: LISTEN WITH NEW EARS
settings.text: Custom titanium drivers are placed under detachable magnetic earcups for optimal performance. This is achieved with strict attention to detail in-house.

settings.heading: Specifications
settings.content:
• Smallest & lightest - (1.75x1.5x0.55) inches
  • Not only for the US & Canada, but a worldwide coverage - up to 190 countries
  • Additional indoor tracking using WiFi & Bluetooth
  • The lowest monthly subscription you can find - as low as $9.95/mo
  • Optional extra 3,500mAh magnetic battery
  • Replaceable battery
  • SOS panic button + 2 extra alert buttons
  • 5 years of history

settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.content: Simply attach your Tracki to the person or thing you wish to locate and see their location information from the website or mobile app. GPS and cellular technology sends the location information to Tracki's servers where you can access the information from anywhere Secured and in Real-Time

settings.heading: Tracki allows you to:
settings.content:
• Track down the whereabouts & driving path of vehicles, boats, planes
  • Track your assets and valuables
  • Track your drone flight path and find it if it gets lost
  • Manage and track fleet, boats and employees activity
  • Track stolen motorcycle, bicycle, construction equipment etc.
  • Locate your children, pets, or elderly relatives at any given time
  • Know when your child has exited a set safety zone
  • Find a lost family member with Dementia or Alzheimer’s Disease
  • Follow up on lost luggage or a business shipment
  • Aid your loved ones in distress

settings.heading: Special Features
settings.content:
• Speed alert - get alerts once device exceeds preset speed
  • Fence alert - get alerts once device leaving geo-fence you set
  • Move alert - get alerts once device starts moving
  • SOS alert once SOS button pressed + 2 more preset alerts buttons
  • Get app, email and/or SMS alerts
  • Live tracking of device path with 1 minute updates
  • Long battery life: 1 month in battery save mode (6x updates/day)
  • Smallest and lightest tracker, only 1.4 Ounce
  • Manage and add up to 100 devices to one account
  • Keep history for up to 5 years showing complete device path history
  • Can set a link to share by email of website embed the device's live path
  • Attach with the supplied magnet to bottom of a car
  • Attach with the supplied clip to pets, belt, bag, pocket
  • Water resistant: product comes with silicon cover
  • Unique Wi-Fi tracking for indoor tracking

settings.heading: Key Benefits
settings.content:
• No activation or cancellation fees | No contracts
  • Low Monthly Subscription of $9.95,  $13.95, $16.60 or $19.95 depending on the package you choose
  • Worldwide Coverage - Tracki device can be tracked via web or smartphone app anywhere GSM cellular reception exists worldwide.
  • SOS Button - With one press of the SOS button, the location can be broadcast via app notification, email, or text
  • Real Time Tracking - GPS and GSM provide instant, highly accurate current location and 5 years of history
  • Smart Alerts - User alerts via text, email, and app notifications for location change, customized speed thresholds, and sudden movement or impact. (Text messages are limited to 10 messages per month)
  • Free Android and iPhone APPS
  • Full customer service and phone support by dedicated experts.

    *The monthly service pays for the worldwide SIM card using the GSM network to report the real time positioning of the device (just like AT&T etc. has monthly fee).

settings.heading: Why Tracki is better than other trackers
settings.content:
1. Monthly fee as low as 9.95/month - other 20-45/mo
  2. Worldwide coverage - most other CA and/or US only
  3. 5 seconds update rate, app manual ping*** other don’t
  4. 1 month battery life in batt save sleep mode* other don’t
  5. 6 month life in save mode with optional batt** - other don’t
  6. Optional larger 3,500mAh magnetic batt** - other don’t
  7. Wi-Fi indoor tracking by reading routers ID - other don’t
  8. Bluetooth for the last 100 feet tracking - other don’t
  9. The Smallest Size - 1.8x1.6x0.7in other 3 times+ bigger
  10. The Lightest Weight by far - 1.4oz other 3.5-16 ounces
  11. Comes with Clip to attach to belt, bag - other don’t
  12. Comes with Magnet - most other have no magnet
  13. Has SOS panic button - half of the other has no SOS
  14. Has replaceable/changeable battery - other don’t
  15. 5 years history - most other only 30-90 days history
  16. Tracki device cost is the cheapest - other cost more
  17. Lifetime warranty - most other 1 year only
  18. 5 min Easy setup - most other lengthy & confusing
  19. 3 minutes to go live on setup - other take 2-24 hours
  20. 4.7 stars on Google Play App reviews - other 3.4-4

*The batt save/sleep mode whereby the device goes to sleep & wakes up every 3 hours, tracking location 8 times per day.

**Optional Extended battery with magnetic waterproof box will last 2 weeks at 1 min update. Up to 6 months in battery save mode.

***Tracki automatic location update rate is as frequent as 1 minute If you need real time with 5 seconds update while watching the app to get the instant location you can manually ping the device every 5 sec.

settings.heading: What's in the box
settings.content:
• 1 Tracki GPS tracking Device
  • 1 Worldwide SIM Card included
  • 1 Micro USB Charging Cable
  • 1 Battery cover with belt clip
  • 1 Battery cover with magnet
  • 1 Battery cover with Velcro
  • 1 Rechargeable Battery
  • Silicon water resistant cover
  • Key-chain attachment
  • Lanyard

settings.heading: Battery Life
settings.content:
• 1-month battery life in battery save mode
  • 6-months battery life in save mode with an optional extra battery
  • 2-3 days battery life tracking 1-5 times/min
  • 3-months battery life tracking once a day

settings.heading: Warranty information
settings.content: Full lifetime warranty: free replacement of all lost or damaged products purchased with a warranty.

settings.text: Download

settings.title: Quick Start Guide
settings.text: Download

settings.title: Product sheet
settings.text: Download
Depth, detail and delight. Dialed up beyond expectation. This is, quite simply, our finest headphone experience.

settings.heading: DON'T BE FOOLED BY BLUETOOTH TRACKERS
settings.description: With a Tracki® device, easily track people, cars or assets in real time.  Tracki®  Worldwide GPS Tracker allows you to monitors location with pinpoint accuracy and track anywhere discreetly while giving you real-time updates.

settings.heading: LESS EFFORT. MORE EMOTION.
settings.description: Quick set up, intuitive user controls and Bluetooth 5.1 allow you to connect easily to the devices you already love. And if you want to make a few sounds of your own, four microphones keep your voice crystal clear on calls.

settings.heading: ALMOST-UNREAL COMFORT
settings.description: So comfortable, it's like you're not wearing them at all. Oval memory foam cushions, soft top grain lambskin and a superior fit invite you to play all day.

settings.heading: STANDOUR ACCESSORIES TO FIT
settings.description: Dynasty Headphone’s finishing touches are made to be touched, with matching aluminium details and woven fabric encasing the audio cable, charging cable and flight adapter.

settings.heading: FIDILITY THAT FLEXES
settings.description: For the rare moments you'll take them off, Dynasty Headphone can be folded and placed into the custom hardcase, which is lined with a super soft textile finish. No matter how much you move, they'll be safe and sound.

settings.heading: MUSIC AT YOUR FINGERTIPS
settings.description: More bass, more warmth, more you. Personalise your listening experience with the app. The equalizer and noise cancellation adjusters give you complete control over how you listen, with just a tap.
Describe the video for customers using screen readers

settings.text: This is an excellent device, accurate reliable and works great. I found the device and subscription price to be way better than all the other GPS trackers. I had few questions and customer service was great.
settings.author: Russell

settings.text: Yet another great customer service experience with "Glen" - He handled all my inquiries, needs and even informed me (to which he also signed me up as well), for Tracki's Lifetime Warranty. He informed me that the Lifetime warranty comes with purchasing Tracki through Amazon- they will replace the device if lost/stolen or ceases to function- and Tracki has already replaced the first device I purchased (it got lost, or I hid it so well I couldn't find it and the battery died, lol!
settings.author: Eric

settings.text: I purchased the Tracki with suspicion of my husband’s activity and thanks for the Tracki I was correct, it was a great device and works amazing, I highly recommend it!
